title: selloa macdonaldii
intro: Selloa macdonaldii is a perennial herb native to Mexico, belonging to the family Hydrophyllaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to provide several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion. Selloa macdonaldii is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be used in conjunction with other herbs in various herbal remedies.
